name: LCNB CORP
summary: LCNB Corp. is an Ohio-based financial holding company headquartered in Lebanon, Ohio, operating primarily through its wholly-owned subsidiary LCNB National Bank. The Bank offers commercial and industrial loans, real estate loans, agricultural loans, consumer loans, SBA loans, wealth management and trust services, fiduciary services, investment management, security brokerage services through LPL Financial, and various deposit and electronic banking services across Southwestern and South Central Ohio and Northern Kentucky.

products.name: Commercial and Industrial Loans
products.description: Lending products for business purposes including commercial and industrial financing.

products.name: Residential Mortgage Loans
products.description: Loans for purchasing or refinancing personal residences and home equity lines of credit.

products.name: Consumer Loans
products.description: Automobile, boat, home improvement, and personal loans for individual customers.

products.name: SBA Loans
products.description: Small Business Administration loan products offered through the Bank.

products.name: Wealth Management and Trust Services
products.description: Trust administration, estate settlement, fiduciary services, and investment management of trusts and agency accounts.

products.name: Security Brokerage Services
products.description: Full range of investment services including mutual funds, securities trading, annuities, and life insurance.

products.name: Mobile and Online Banking
products.description: PC Internet banking, mobile banking, and 24-hour telephone banking services.

products.name: Cash Management Services
products.description: Cash management, wire transfers, electronic funds transfer, and debit card services for individuals and businesses.

partnerships.description: Registered broker/dealer arrangement through which the Bank offers security brokerage and investment services.
